zh.lifeSummary: 當William Ragsdale於1534年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆時，他的父親Henry Ragsdale24歲，母親Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe19歲。他於1569年與Vanessa Travis在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾聶頓享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Ragsdale于1534年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆时，他的父亲Henry Ragsdale24岁，母亲Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe19岁。他于1569年与Vanessa Travis在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾聶頓享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Ragsdale was born in 1534, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Henry Ragsdale, was 24 and his mother, Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, was 19. He married Vanessa Travis in 1569, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1615, in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Ragsdale est né en 1534, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Ragsdale, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Vanessa Travis en 1569, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1615, à Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Ragsdale 1534 in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Ragsdale 24 und seine Mutter Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe 19. Er hat 1569 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Vanessa Travis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1615 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Ragsdale è nato il nel 1534 nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Henry Ragsdale, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Vanessa Travis nel 1569, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1615, nel Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ragsdaleが1534年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホーバーインガムで生まれた時，父Henry Ragsdaleは24歳，母Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpeは19歳であった。1569年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでVanessa Travisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアネエトンで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ragsdale(이)가 1534년 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Ragsdale(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1569년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Vanessa Travis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 니턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Ragsdale nasceu em 1534, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Ragsdale, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Vanessa Travis em 1569, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1615, em Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Ragsdale родился в 1534 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Ragsdale было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Vanessa Travis в 1569 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1615 г. в местности нитон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Ragsdale nació en 1534, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Ragsdale, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Vanessa Travis en 1569, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1615, en Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
